headline: eBay vs. Macy's: Which Consumer Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: eBay leans into enthusiast categories and digital scale, while Macy's bets on luxury and store revamps. See how their financials and risks stack up in 2026.

raw.headline: eBay vs. Macy's: Which Consumer Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
raw.summary: eBay leans into enthusiast categories and digital scale, while Macy's bets on luxury and store revamps. See how their financials and risks stack up in 2026.

headline: Ryan Cohen Isn't Giving Up On eBay As GameStop Reiterates Takeover Plans Despite Initial Rejection
summary: On Friday, GameStop reaffirmed its eBay takeover bid despite the rejection while forecasting stronger 2026 earnings.

raw.headline: Ryan Cohen Isn't Giving Up On eBay As GameStop Reiterates Takeover Plans Despite Initial Rejection

headline: GME Stock Jumps After-Hours — GameStop Hikes FY26 EBITDA Outlook To $600M, Nearly Double Of FY25
summary: The company currently expects to generate adjusted earnings before interest, taxation, depreciation and amortization (EBITDA) in excess of $600 million, compared to $345.4 million in the fiscal year 2025.
